== Notes for [[Item:Q88325|Q88325]] ==

ID: I62070

Name: Julus of Rome

Surname: Julus of Rome

Sex: M

_UID: E5B87DAF4080424E941E061C5E8215EBCDD8

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Father: Acanius

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Lucius Julius Julus of Rome

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I62070

MILITARY TRIBUNE WITH CONSULAR AUTHORITY

Lucius Julius Julus was the son of Caius Julius Julus, who was the son ofCaius Julius Julus, who was the son of Lucius Julius Julus, who was theson of Numerius Julius Julus. There is then another gap of about 560years separating him from Julus, who was the son of Ascanius, who was theson of Aeneas, famous hero of The Iliad and The Aenead.

DEPRIVED OF SUCCESSION TO HIS FATHER IN THE KINGDOM OF LATIUM, WAS MADE HIGHT
PRIEST, WHICH OFFICE CONTINUED IN HIS FAMILY (AS SOME THINK) DOWN TO JULIUS
CAESAR [DICTATOR]; HIS DESCENDANTS ARE UNKNOWN FOR ABOUT 560 YEARS, DURING BOTH
LATIN AND ROMAN KINGS, UNTIL ABOUT THE REIGN OF TARQUINIUS SUPERBUS, WHEN
EVIDENCE IS FOUND OF ONE WHO ASSERTED HIS CLAIM TO DESCENT FROM JULIUS, SON OF
ASCANIUS, SON OF AENEAS [SEE LUCIUS JULIUS JULUS, FATHER OF CAIUS JULIUS JULUS]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
